top_signals.title: CFTC Seeks Input on 24/7 Futures, Energy Perpetuals Trades
top_signals.summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission asked for public input on both perpetual contracts and 24/7 trading for traditional energy derivatives, after industry heavyweights raised concerns about offshore platforms and excessive levels of risk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
